goal: Make strict local toolchain setup reproducible for MIB Studio verification by adding a focused preparer for the pinned Node, Rust, and pnpm versions used by bootstrap_dev.sh.
head: 72b1ef4
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a DevEx utility for preparing the strict verification toolchain, focused tests, and current-state documentation only.
required_evidence: Strict toolchain preparer reads pinned versions from repository files instead of duplicating durable version truth.
Dry-run emits the exact Node, Rust, and pnpm targets plus official download/cache actions without network writes.
Focused tests cover version discovery, dry-run planning, existing-tool detection, and command failure handling.
bootstrap_dev.sh m1-smoke still passes with the prepared strict local toolchain.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO until real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint evidence exists.
warnings: The current host still has no nvidia-smi, real adapter, strict model cache, or mib-export:test image evidence.
This gate improves verification reproducibility only; it does not change product behavior or release readiness.
Multi-agent subagents were not spawned because the available spawn tool requires explicit user request for delegation.

phase_notes.plan: Add a narrow DevEx utility that prepares the strict Node/Rust/pnpm toolchain expected by bootstrap_dev.sh, defaulting to /tmp/mib-toolchain and /tmp/corepack.
phase_notes.audit: bootstrap_dev.sh already prefers /tmp/mib-toolchain but there is no repo command to materialize it. The last hook failure was a strict toolchain mismatch, not a product test failure.
phase_notes.build: Create scripts/prepare_strict_toolchain.py, focused tests, and update DevEx/working docs without touching product runtime or release evidence.
phase_notes.check: Run JSON validation, focused tests, dry-run JSON validation, strict bootstrap m1-smoke, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this DevEx reproducibility phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Strict toolchain preparation utility, focused tests, DevEx documentation, WORKING state, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
